# Everybody's Beautiful – Beauty Salon

> A friendly, professional unisex beauty salon located at 20 High Street, Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, GL10 2NA. Established 2009. Phone: 01453 823903. Email: everybodysbeautiful@live.com. Online booking: https://phorest.com/book/salons/everybodysbeautiful

## About
Everybody's Beautiful is a welcoming unisex beauty salon offering a comprehensive range of beauty, wellness and aesthetic treatments. The salon was founded in 2009 by Cheryl Hodges and prides itself on professional, friendly service and the use of premium brands.

## Team
- **Cheryl Hodges** – Salon Owner & Experienced Beauty Therapist (owner since 2009). Qualifications include CACI Microdermabrasion, Eve Taylor London Skincare, Spray Tanning, Gelish Gel Nails, Lash Extensions.
- **Hayley Haines** – Experienced Beauty Therapist with 19 years' experience. NVQ Levels 2 & 3, National Diploma in Indian Head Massage. Previously worked in 4 and 5 star spas. Joined EB in 2018.
- **Kate McEvoy** – Clinic Nurse. Registered Nurse (qualified 1995), Independent Nurse Prescriber (UWE 2018), Lead Practice Nurse at a GP Practice. Aesthetics training with Derma Medical, London. Insured with Cosmetic Insure.
- **Micky Parnell** – Beauty Therapist & Reiki Master. Specialist in holistic healing, skincare and wellness.
- **Jade Hodges** – Beauty Therapist (joined January 2025). Qualified in lash lifting & tinting, facials, manicures, pedicures and gel. Training in waxing and brow treatments.
- **Hana Fujimoto** – Massage & Facial Therapist. ITEC Level 3 Holistic Massage, ITEC Level 3 Aromatherapy, CPD Deep Tissue (BCMB). Previously at Neal's Yard Remedies Bristol.
- **Elisha Cave** – Beauty Therapist (joined November 2025). Level 2 qualified.

## Treatments & Pricing

### Facial Treatments
- Eve Taylor Express Facial – £29 (30 mins)
- Eve Taylor Essential Facial – £40 (45 mins)
- Revitalizing Spring Facial – £44.50 (60 mins)
- Ultra Bright Facial – £44.50 (60 mins)
- Skin Quenching Facial – £44.50 (60 mins)
- Eve Taylor Intensive Facial – £49.50 (75 mins)
- Eve Taylor Cryogenic Facial – £44.50 (60 mins)
- Monu Resurface & Peel Facial – £51
- SkinBase Microdermabrasion – £41 (30 mins)

### Body Massage & Holistic
- Swedish BNS Massage – £31; Full Body – £43; Full Body + Scalp – £48
- Aromatherapy BNS – £35.50; Full Body – £45.50
- Deep Tissue BNS – £35.50; Full Body – £45.50
- Hot Stones BNS – £33.50; Back of Body – £36.50; Full Body – £50.50
- Body Glow! Full Body Exfoliation – £45.50
- Light Legs Revival – £31 (NEW)
- Reiki Healing (with Micky) – £42
- Indian Head Massage – £32 (30 mins) / £36.50 (45 mins)
- Hopi Ear Candles – £33

### Eye Treatments
- Eyebrow Shaping (Tweeze/Wax) – £12
- Eyebrow Tinting – £11.50
- Eyelash Tinting – £17
- Lash & Brow Tint with Shape – £31.50
- Lash Lift – £39; Lash Lift & Tint – £44
- Brow Lamination – £39
- Classic Lash Extensions Full Set – £66; Infills – £41.50
- Hybrid Lash Extensions Full Set – £75; Infills – £43
- Volume Lash Extensions Full Set – £80; Infills – £46
- Lash Extension Removal – £16
- Patch test required at least 24 hours before all eye treatments.

### Waxing
- Eyebrows – £12; Top Lip – £11; Chin – from £10.50; Top Lip & Chin – from £16
- Under Arms – £12; Bikini Line – from £18; Arms (half) – from £18
- Half Leg – £21; Full Leg – £29.50; Half Leg & Bikini – from £35; Full Leg & Bikini – from £40
- Hot Wax: Under Arms – £14; Top Lip & Chin – from £18; Brazilian – £28; Hollywood – £32; Playboy – £36
- Men's: Back – £26; Chest – £26; Brow Tidy – £11.50

### Spray Tanning (tint. brand)
- Full Body – £29; Half Body – £25

### Aesthetics (with Nurse Kate McEvoy)
- Anti-wrinkle injections, dermal fillers, excessive sweating injections, B12 injections (NEW)
- Free no-obligation consultations available. Prices on enquiry.

### Holistic Therapies
- Indian Head Massage – £30 (30 mins) / £34.50 (45 mins)
- Hopi Ear Candles – £32
- Reiki Healing (with Micky) – £40

### Pedicure Treatments
- File & Normal Polish – £20; File, Cuticles & Gel – £34
- Essential Pedicure: Normal – £26.50; Gel – £40.50
- Elim MediHeel Pedicure: Normal – £34.50; Gel – £48
- Luxurious Elim MediHeel: Normal – £39.50; Gel – £53
- Hydrating Paraffin Wax: Normal – £39.50; Gel – £53
- Callus Treatment alone – £29; Added to pedicure – +£21

### Manicures & Gel Nails (Gelish)
- Gelish Full Set Hands – £34; Full Set Feet – £34; With Structure Gel – £39
- Gelish + Sensuous Manicure – £42; Gelish + Eco Pedicure – £48
- File & Polish – £19; Essential Manicure – £25
- Sensuous Manicure (normal polish) – £30; (gel) – £42
- Sublime Manicure – £37; Hydrating Paraffin Wax Manicure – £38
- Gel Removal – £15; Soak Off free when having new set by us
- Nail Art from 50p per nail

### Ear Piercing
- Both Lobes Plain Studs – £28; Jewelled – £32
- Single Lobe Plain – £22; Jewelled – £24
- All include aftercare lotion and advice slip.

## Brands Used
- Eve Taylor London (skincare, facials)
- Gelish (gel nails)
- SkinBase Microdermabrasion & SkinBase Hydro
- Marvellash (lash extensions)
- tint. (spray tanning)
- Elim MediHeel & MediHand (pedicures & manicures)

## Opening Hours
- Monday: 9:30am – 2:30pm
- Tuesday: 9:15am – 7:30pm
- Wednesday: 9:00am – 5:00pm
- Thursday: 10:00am – 7:30pm
- Friday: 9:00am – 5:00pm
- Saturday: 9:00am – 2:00pm
- Sunday & Bank Holidays: Closed

## Booking Policy
- 25% deposit required on all bookings
- 48 hours' notice required for free cancellation/rescheduling
- Cash, card and smart pay accepted (not Amex)

## Location
20 High Street, Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, GL10 2NA
